title: Chapter 49
content:
Chapter 49: Chapter 49: Taking Care of Lackeys

Looking at them lunging at him, it makes Damon laugh internally.

’Wow, classic cultivator lackeys’ stereotype, they like to blabber about everything like they have everything in control.’

’Anyway, let’s take care of them, and kill that son of a bitch that aiming for my woman.’

Damon just stood still and activated his sword aura. The air around him became sharper, but those goons cannot feel anything change.

When the twelve inner disciples entered the range of the sword aura, they felt something wrong but is too late.

They all stop, and they just stayed still. The core disciple leader looks at it and shout.

"What the hell are you stopping for! kill him!"

"They can’t, senior brother." Damon answers him instead and slowly walking to the core disciple.

As he walks the 12 inner disciple head start to fell from their body to the ground one by one. Blood spurting from their neck like a fountain.

Shocked gasping resounded as head fell. Blood spurting from their neck like a fountain, and the core disciple stared at the horrifying scene with wide eyes and dropped jaws, looking as though they were watching a scene from hell.

As Damon walk closer his legs feels like jelly and he fell to the ground on his butt.

"What did you do? What just happen?!" The core disciple shout as he fell like he was dreaming.

Then suddenly he feels Damon cultivation.

"No, there’s no way this is real, you are eight stages of elementary spirit realm when the recruitment days ago from what I heard, now you are second stage of true spirit realm. You must be using forbidden or demon technique!"

Hearing that Damon stops a moment.

’What? If someone like him think of me like that, that’s going to be a problem. Look like I need control my cultivation speed. Anyway, let’s finish this and go back.’

Damon then continues walk to the core disciple and when he right if front of him he grabs his head with one hand and lift him up.

"So, what if you think of me like that, you not gonna live to tell the tale." Damon said as he uses his Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art, to send a little tribulation lightning.

"Arggghh"

The core disciple began to scream in pain, as his body slowly burn by electricity until he turns in ash.

Now everyone dead, Damon move back to their body and start to collect their storage ring. He shoves it all to his storage ring and left.

While everything happen Neko is on Damon shoulder all the time look at the situation with uninterested eyes.

****

Damon dash using astral step and arrived at Crimson Moon City in a few minutes. when there he bought a few clothes for Neko and continue his journey back to the sect.

The journey back to the sect quite fast as Damon use his astral step, he wants to see how long it will take if he uses his astral step to travel.

On the way there Neko asks Damon in his mind.

’Master, where are we going?’ as she still on Damon shoulder on her cat form but her eyes look sleepy.

’To the sect that I’m staying, what’s wrong you hungry? want more lightning?’

’Hmm... no, I’m still full, just sleepy.’

Damon stops mid-way and moves her into is arms.

’You can sleep, now I will wake you up when we arrived.’

"Nya~" following what Damon said she yawn and began to curl up into a ball, then sleep in Damon arm.

Seeing that Damon lips curl into a smile and thought.

’She is really cute, and act like a kid and cat at the same time, I bet Ariel and the girls will like her.’

Then he continues his journey as they began for the plan moving forward.

’For now, let focus to be inner disciple with Ariel, with her progress a few weeks should be enough to seen as genius but not to cause a suspicion. I can also farm point while at it.’

’I also need to hold my cultivation maybe for a few weeks, or a technique to hide my cultivation if needed so I don’t to hold back. System is the any technique or ability to hide my cultivation?’

[For what host needed, system suggest host pick ability rather than technique, since ability didn’t use qi or spiritual energy it can’t be detected. System recommends this ability.]

[Polymorph]

[Description: It’s an ability that can manipulate/change the user into anything, including body, aura, and cultivation.]

[Ability]

[Price: 75,000]

’It’s really good, with this I can even change into different people, combine with Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art, I can vanish then appear as another person.’

’This also useful for sex, I can change my dick size into ideal form for each girl, hehehe.’

’System, buy it.’

[You bought Polymorph. -75,000 lust points]

He immediately uses it just for his cultivation for now. His cultivation aura began to grow weaker and weaker, from Second Level of True Spirit Realm, until it stops at Ninth Level of Elementary Spirit Realm.

’Good, with this I can just say when the recruitment day, I already close to breakthrough.’

Then Damon opens his status to see the change and check his lust points.

[Name: Damon]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Earth: 60, Lightning: 310, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 101,710]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

’Good, with this, I won’t rise a suspicion, and I can still be seen as genius.’

Damon thought that as he can see the Azure Dragon Sect.
